auto_brown_university_annulus_biocompati.ri_parallel: For Brain electrode annulus + catheter system, ClearPoint Neuro shows a precedent path via Commercial neuro navigation (Public (NASDAQ CLPT); ~$335M market cap (May 2026)) with regulatory/clinical milestones documented on their site.
auto_brown_university_annulus_biocompati.science_summary: MRI-guided interventions for functional neurosurgery and biologics delivery; SmartFlow cannula and ClearPoint Neuro Navigation System for minimally invasive brain access.

clinical_milestones.text: FDA-cleared navigation platform for intracranial procedures and drug delivery workflows.

kol_signals.text: Used at leading academic neurosurgery centers for MRI-guided deep brain access.

reimbursement_notes.text: Dedicated reimbursement resources for hospital coding and coverage support.

theromics_ri::Profound Medical (TULSA-PR.ri_parallel: For Theromics — tumor thermal ablation, Profound Medical (TULSA-PRO) shows a precedent path via Commercial ablation platform (Public (NASDAQ PROF); ~$253M market cap (May 2026)) with published reimbursement/access positioning on their site.
theromics_ri::Profound Medical (TULSA-PR.science_summary: Transurethral ultrasound ablation (TULSA-PRO) for prostate tissue; thermal ablation under real-time MRI guidance with established clinical adoption path.

clinical_milestones.text: FDA clearance and expanding clinical evidence for MRI-guided thermal ablation.

kol_signals.text: Interventional radiology and urology KOL adoption at tertiary centers.

reimbursement_notes.text: Hospital reimbursement support materials for procedural coding and coverage.
